title: Intent
description: Canonical schema for the intent artifact -- the operator's crystallized intent at the session seed. Version 2.0.0. commons is the spec authority; INTENT.md carries the governing prose and ADR-0005 describes the system-conventions pattern under which this lives. When this schema and INTENT.md disagree, INTENT.md is authoritative.

source.description: Where this came from (operator, user report, automated detection).

target.description: Optional opaque locator for what the intent is aimed at.
